The '''aquabeast''' was an aquatic creature, native to the forest planet [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. They were found in the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]], and would often travel in packs. They also were very powerful swimmers, clocking in at 60 miles per hour.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}}
